backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, blog posts, contact submissions, lead magnet downloads, orders, advisory applications, Stripe integration, and authorization with access control and rate limiting for failed login attempts.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting LinkedIn Insight Tag installation, LinkedIn conversion tracking for advisory applications, strategy call clicks, toolkit purchases, and checklist downloads, plus Meta Pixel installation across frontend files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components and pages, detailing routing, LinkedIn conversion tracking integration, form validation, product pages, and corrected branding/route configurations.
frontend/ANALYTICS_SETUP.md: Step-by-step guide for configuring Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Search Console, including measurement ID setup, verification code installation, access management, and troubleshooting instructions.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes, including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with meta tags, analytics integrations (Google Analytics, LinkedIn Insight, Meta Pixel), security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options), and DPDP Act 2023 consent mode configuration.
frontend/public/_headers: Static HTTP security headers configuration file defining Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy for all routes.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page routes, QueryClient for data fetching, and SecurityHeadersValidator for development mode.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminNav.t: Fixed sidebar navigation for admin panel with links to Dashboard, Content, Pricing, Testimonials, Credentials sections and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: Reusable card component for displaying admin dashboard statistics with title, numeric value, icon, and optional loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying company info, product/service links, legal/contact links, and a CTA section with social media (LinkedIn) integration.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menus, and a CTA button that triggers LinkedIn conversion tracking on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders Header, Footer, and an Outlet for nested route content in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/SecurityHeadersV: Development-only component that validates presence of security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy) via meta tags and displays warnings or success alerts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: React hook that checks if the current user is an authenticated admin by calling the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method, combining Internet Identity and actor loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including blog posts, contact forms, lead downloads, advisory applications, and Stripe checkout session creation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a color scheme based on Deep Navy primary and Emerald Green accent colors, including light/dark mode variants and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/tracking.ts: Utility module for LinkedIn conversion tracking with type-safe helper function to trigger conversion events via the lintrk global.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component describing AIShield India's mission to provide accessible cybersecurity solutions for Indian startups, highlighting SOC experience and practical approach.
Admin dashboard page displaying statistics (applications, contacts, leads) and recent submissions using React Query to fetch data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout wrapper that handles Internet Identity authentication, admin authorization checks, and renders the admin navigation sidebar with logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContentManageme: Content management page for editing Security Advisory page text (capacity message, cost comparison, service description) with input sanitization and validation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CredentialsMana: Credentials management page for updating SOC 2, ISO 27001, and expertise items with validation and sanitization for security credentials display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PricingManageme: Pricing management page for configuring advisory pricing ranges and toolkit tier prices with numeric validation and currency formatting.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Testimonials management page with CRUD operations for client testimonials, including dialog-based forms with input sanitization and validation.
Confirmation page displayed after advisory application submission, explaining next steps and providing links to free resources while users await approval.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Displays a list of blog posts with featured images, author, date, tags, and excerpts; fetches posts using useGetBlogPosts hook and links to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Renders a single blog post detail page with featured image, metadata (author, date, tags), and HTML content; fetches post data by ID using useGetBlogPost hook.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact form page with validation and sanitization for name, email, company, and message fields; submits data via useSubmitContactForm hook and displays success state after submission.
frontend/src/pages/FreeChecklist.tsx: Landing page for AI Risk Self-Assessment Checklist download; collects email, records lead via useRecordLeadDownload hook, fires LinkedIn conversion tracking, and shows success confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage with hero section, problem statement, and CTAs for security advisory booking and free checklist download; includes LinkedIn conversion tracking on strategy call button.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying error message with troubleshooting steps and CTAs to retry payment or contact support.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a payment success confirmation page with download instructions and next steps. Tracks LinkedIn conversion events once per page load using URL parameters for order value.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders the privacy policy page detailing data collection, usage, and compliance with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 for AIShield India (sole proprietorship).
frontend/src/pages/products/SecurityTool: Marketing and sales page for AI & Startup Security Toolkit with three pricing tiers (Basic ₹7,999, Pro ₹9,999, Pro+ ₹14,999), featuring hero section, product mockups, and Stripe checkout integration.
Comparison landing page contrasting Security Advisory services (₹49,999-₹1,50,000) with DIY Security Toolkit products, highlighting differences in implementation support and customization.
Product page for SOC Analyst Playbook (₹2,999) with purchase button that creates a Stripe checkout session for a digital download including incident investigation templates and worksheets.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Displays refund policy stating digital products are non-refundable while advisory services have conditional refund terms based on work completion status.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityAdvisory.tsx: Provides a multi-field application form for security advisory services with validation, sanitization, and submission handling. Tracks LinkedIn conversions on successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditions.tsx: Renders terms and conditions page covering service descriptions, advisory disclaimers, intellectual property rights, and legal terms for AIShield India's services and digital products.
frontend/src/utils/inputSanitization.ts: Utility functions for sanitizing and validating user input including text sanitization, HTML stripping, email/URL/numeric validation, and form data sanitization.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities supporting both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette (navy, emerald), OKLCH color system, container settings, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
frontend/TRACKING_SETUP.md: Detailed setup instructions for LinkedIn Insight Tag and Meta Pixel, including partner ID configuration, conversion tracking for key business events, placeholder replacement reference table, and verification steps.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for an advisory/consulting business website with LinkedIn Insight Tag, Meta Pixel, and Google Analytics integrations. Documents seven completed features for conversion tracking (advisory applications, strategy calls, toolkit purchases, checklist downloads) and two pending feature requests for LinkedIn and Meta pixel installation.
